hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Meet your guides to discovering Georgia's hidden treasures

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Georgian Treasure was founded in 2019 when a group of local enthusiasts decided to share Georgia's unique beauty with the world. Our mission was to create authentic, personalized tours that show the real face of Adjara.
story.paragraph2: Today, we are one of the leading tour companies in Batumi, serving thousands of tourists annually. Our team consists of professional guides who speak 6 languages and know every secret of the region.
story.paragraph3: Our goal is to create unforgettable memories for every traveler who wants to discover Georgia's true treasure.

hero.title: Reviews
hero.subtitle: Meet our satisfied travelers and their stories

review1.text: Undoubtedly the best tour I've ever had! Giorgi planned everything so perfectly that every detail was ideal. Mountains, wine, Georgian hospitality — everything exceeded high expectations.

review2.text: As a German, I have high standards. Georgian Treasure exceeded all expectations. Professionalism, punctuality, and genuine love for Georgia — that's what sets them apart.

review3.text: Traveling with children is always a challenge. But everything was planned so well that even the kids were delighted. Special thanks to Mariam for her patience!

review4.text: Who knew Georgia was such a wine country? The Kakheti tour changed my life. Now I return every year and discover new surprises each time.

review5.text: Svaneti is simply unreal — it's another world. Ushguli's ancient towers, alpine lakes, mountain air. This was a journey I'll remember forever.

review6.text: Canyons, caves, waterfalls — Western Georgia is a wonder of nature. The guides' knowledge and enthusiasm made everything even more special.

cta.title: Want to share your experience too?
